requirement_topic.en: QGOSM Conformity / Product Registration — Market-Access Gate for Refrigerators in Qatar
requirement_topic.zh: QGOSM合格评定/产品注册——电冰箱进入卡塔尔的市场准入门槛
requirement_topic.zht: QGOSM合格評定/產品註冊——電冰箱進入卡塔爾的市場准入門檻

summary.en: Household refrigerators are regulated products in Qatar and require conformity assessment / product registration with the Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology (QGOSM) under the Ministry of Commerce and Industry (MOCI) before customs clearance and sale. There is no single CE-style mark; instead, a refrigerator must demonstrate conformity across the applicable GSO-adopted standards — electrical safety (GSO IEC 60335-2-24, see frigqa-safety-001), EMC (GSO CISPR 14 series, see frigqa-emc-001), and energy efficiency / labelling (GSO MEPS + GSO/Qatar energy label, see frigqa-energy-001/002) — and obtain the QGOSM-accepted conformity certificate or registration. The typical package includes: test reports from a recognised laboratory referencing the GSO-adopted standards (IECEE CB reports may be leveraged), a certificate of conformity, the rating plate and markings for a 240 V / 50 Hz supply, Arabic (and usually English) documentation, and the GSO/Qatar energy-efficiency label. Goods are imported through Qatar ports (principally Hamad Port). Smart/radio-enabled models additionally require CRA type approval (separate from QGOSM).
summary.zh: 家用电冰箱在卡塔尔属于受监管产品，在清关和销售前须向商业和工业部（MOCI）下属的卡塔尔标准与计量总局（QGOSM）进行合格评定/产品注册。不存在单一的CE式标识；电冰箱须在适用的GSO采用标准方面证明合格——电气安全（GSO IEC 60335-2-24，见frigqa-safety-001）、电磁兼容（GSO CISPR 14系列，见frigqa-emc-001）及能效/标识（GSO MEPS + GSO/卡塔尔能效标签，见frigqa-energy-001/002）——并取得QGOSM接受的合格证书或注册。典型文件包通常包括：认可实验室出具的引用GSO采用标准的检测报告（可利用IECEE CB报告）、合格证书、按240 V / 50 Hz电源的铭牌及标识、阿拉伯语（通常附英语）文件，以及GSO/卡塔尔能效标签。货物经卡塔尔港口（主要为哈马德港）进口。智能/无线型号另须取得CRA型号核准（与QGOSM分立）。
summary.zht: 家用電冰箱在卡塔爾屬於受監管產品，在清關和銷售前須向商業和工業部（MOCI）下屬的卡塔爾標準與計量總局（QGOSM）進行合格評定/產品註冊。不存在單一的CE式標識；電冰箱須在適用的GSO採用標準方面證明合格——電氣安全（GSO IEC 60335-2-24，見frigqa-safety-001）、電磁相容（GSO CISPR 14系列，見frigqa-emc-001）及能效/標識（GSO MEPS + GSO/卡塔爾能效標籤，見frigqa-energy-001/002）——並取得QGOSM接受的合格證書或註冊。典型文件包通常包括：認可實驗室出具的引用GSO採用標準的檢測報告（可利用IECEE CB報告）、合格證書、按240 V / 50 Hz電源的銘牌及標識、阿拉伯語（通常附英語）文件，以及GSO/卡塔爾能效標籤。貨物經卡塔爾港口（主要為哈馬德港）進口。智能/無線型號另須取得CRA型號核准（與QGOSM分立）。

standards_or_laws: QGOSM (Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology, under MOCI) — conformity assessment / product registration for regulated products including refrigerators
GSO IEC 60335-2-24 (safety) + GSO CISPR 14-1/14-2 (EMC) + GSO MEPS and GSO/Qatar energy label (energy) — the standards bundle a refrigerator must satisfy
Hamad Port — principal Qatar import gateway; QGOSM conformity required for customs clearance
Communications Regulatory Authority (CRA) — additional type approval for radio-enabled (smart) appliances

summary.en: In China, household refrigerators require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before sale, plus the China Energy Label (based on GB 12021.2). CCC is a mandatory third-party certification administered by CNCA-designated certification bodies; the energy label is administered by NDRC/SAMR. These are domestic Chinese schemes: a CCC certificate and a China Energy Label establish compliance for the Chinese market only and are not accepted by QGOSM as evidence of conformity for the Qatar market. There is no single Chinese mark equivalent to the bundled QGOSM conformity demonstration.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用电冰箱在销售前须取得涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）的中国强制认证（CCC），并须有中国能效标识（基于GB 12021.2）。CCC为强制性第三方认证，由CNCA指定认证机构审核；能效标识由NDRC/SAMR管理。上述为中国国内制度：CCC证书和中国能效标识仅证明符合中国市场要求，不被QGOSM接受为卡塔尔市场的合格证据。中国没有单一标识等同于QGOSM捆绑式合格评定。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用電冰箱在銷售前須取得涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）的中國強制認證（CCC），並須有中國能效標識（基於GB 12021.2）。CCC為強制性第三方認證，由CNCA指定認證機構審核；能效標識由NDRC/SAMR管理。上述為中國國內制度：CCC證書和中國能效標識僅證明符合中國市場要求，不被QGOSM接受為卡塔爾市場的合格證據。中國沒有單一標識等同於QGOSM捆綁式合格評定。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must build a Qatar conformity package from scratch — CCC and the China Energy Label do not substitute for QGOSM conformity: (1) Conformity assessment / registration with QGOSM referencing the GSO-adopted standards (safety, EMC, energy) — a recognised certificate of conformity is generally required, not a manufacturer self-declaration alone. (2) Test evidence referencing GSO/IEC and GSO/CISPR standards, ideally via IECEE CB Scheme reports to reduce duplicate testing, plus GSO-adopted IEC 62552 energy measurement at Gulf climate-class conditions. (3) 240 V / 50 Hz rating plate and markings; Arabic (and usually English) instructions and labelling. (4) The GSO/Qatar energy-efficiency label (frigqa-energy-002). (5) An in-country importer / responsible party who holds the registration and clears goods at Hamad Port (frigqa-market-002). (6) CRA type approval for any smart/connected models. Without QGOSM conformity, goods cannot clear customs or be legally sold in Qatar.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须从头建立卡塔尔合格文件包——CCC和中国能效标识不能替代QGOSM合格评定：（1）向QGOSM进行引用GSO采用标准（安全、电磁兼容、能效）的合格评定/注册——通常须取得认可的合格证书，而非仅凭制造商自我声明。（2）引用GSO/IEC及GSO/CISPR标准的检测证据，最好通过IECEE CB体系报告以减少重复测试，并在海湾气候等级条件下按GSO采用的IEC 62552进行能效测量。（3）240 V / 50 Hz铭牌及标识；阿拉伯语（通常附英语）说明书及标识。（4）GSO/卡塔尔能效标签（frigqa-energy-002）。（5）持有注册并在哈马德港清关的当地进口商/责任方（frigqa-market-002）。（6）任何智能/联网型号的CRA型号核准。无QGOSM合格评定，货物不能清关或在卡塔尔合法销售。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須從頭建立卡塔爾合格文件包——CCC和中國能效標識不能替代QGOSM合格評定：（1）向QGOSM進行引用GSO採用標準（安全、電磁相容、能效）的合格評定/註冊——通常須取得認可的合格證書，而非僅憑製造商自我聲明。（2）引用GSO/IEC及GSO/CISPR標準的檢測證據，最好通過IECEE CB體系報告以減少重複測試，並在海灣氣候等級條件下按GSO採用的IEC 62552進行能效測量。（3）240 V / 50 Hz銘牌及標識；阿拉伯語（通常附英語）說明書及標識。（4）GSO/卡塔爾能效標籤（frigqa-energy-002）。（5）持有註冊並在哈馬德港清關的當地進口商/責任方（frigqa-market-002）。（6）任何智能/聯網型號的CRA型號核准。無QGOSM合格評定，貨物不能清關或在卡塔爾合法銷售。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — QGOSM conformity assessment / product registration covering safety, EMC, and energy is required before customs clearance and sale in Qatar; radio-enabled models also require CRA type approval
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China

source.publisher: Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology (QGOSM) / Ministry of Commerce and Industry (MOCI)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] QGOSM conformity assessment / product registration (bundling GSO-adopted safety, EMC, and energy requirements) is the mandatory market-access gate for household refrigerators in Qatar. Chinese CCC and the China Energy Label are separate domestic schemes and do not substitute; manufacturers must build the Qatar conformity package, rate the unit for 240 V / 50 Hz, and clear goods through Hamad Port via a registered importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] QGOSM合格评定/产品注册（捆绑GSO采用的安全、电磁兼容及能效要求）是家用电冰箱进入卡塔尔市场的强制性准入门槛。中国CCC和中国能效标识是独立的国内制度，不能替代；制造商须建立卡塔尔合格文件包，按240 V / 50 Hz额定产品，并通过注册进口商经哈马德港清关。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] QGOSM合格評定/產品註冊（捆綁GSO採用的安全、電磁相容及能效要求）是家用電冰箱進入卡塔爾市場的強制性准入門檻。中國CCC和中國能效標識是獨立的國內制度，不能替代；製造商須建立卡塔爾合格文件包，按240 V / 50 Hz額定產品，並通過註冊進口商經哈馬德港清關。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer / Responsible Party — Qatar Market-Access Requirement
requirement_topic.zh: 当地进口商/责任方——卡塔尔市场准入要求
requirement_topic.zht: 當地進口商/責任方——卡塔爾市場准入要求

summary.en: Goods placed on the Qatar market must be imported by a locally established, commercially registered Qatari importer holding the appropriate trade licence and import registration. For household refrigerators, the in-country importer is the responsible party that holds (or is named on) the QGOSM product registration/conformity certificate, presents the conformity documentation for customs clearance at Hamad Port, and is the point of contact for market surveillance. A foreign (Chinese) manufacturer cannot directly place products on the Qatar market without such an established importer/distributor — the importer's commercial registration, customs broker arrangements, and licence are prerequisites for clearance. The importer is typically named on shipping and conformity documents and is responsible for ensuring the product carries the required GSO/Qatar energy label and 240 V / 50 Hz-rated markings before retail distribution.
summary.zh: 投放卡塔尔市场的货物须由当地设立、商业注册并持有相应营业执照和进口注册的卡塔尔进口商进口。对于家用电冰箱，当地进口商为责任方，持有（或被列名于）QGOSM产品注册/合格证书，在哈马德港清关时出示合格文件，并作为市场监管的联系点。外国（中国）制造商在没有此类设立进口商/经销商的情况下不能直接将产品投放卡塔尔市场——进口商的商业注册、报关安排和执照是清关的前提。进口商通常列名于运输和合格文件中，负责确保产品在零售分销前带有所需的GSO/卡塔尔能效标签及240 V / 50 Hz额定标识。
summary.zht: 投放卡塔爾市場的貨物須由當地設立、商業註冊並持有相應營業執照和進口註冊的卡塔爾進口商進口。對於家用電冰箱，當地進口商為責任方，持有（或被列名於）QGOSM產品註冊/合格證書，在哈馬德港清關時出示合格文件，並作為市場監管的聯繫點。外國（中國）製造商在沒有此類設立進口商/經銷商的情況下不能直接將產品投放卡塔爾市場——進口商的商業註冊、報關安排和執照是清關的前提。進口商通常列名於運輸和合格文件中，負責確保產品在零售分銷前帶有所需的GSO/卡塔爾能效標籤及240 V / 50 Hz額定標識。

standards_or_laws: Qatar import / commercial registration requirements (MOCI) — locally established importer with valid trade licence required to import regulated goods
QGOSM registration — held by or naming the in-country importer/responsible party; presented for customs clearance at Hamad Port
Hamad Port customs clearance — importer/customs-broker documentation required for entry

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent requiring an export manufacturer to appoint a foreign-country in-country importer/responsible party for product compliance. Chinese export manufacturers typically engage overseas distributors or trading companies on a commercial basis, without a statutory obligation analogous to Qatar's in-country importer requirement. Under the domestic CCC regime, the certification holder is the responsible party for the Chinese market only; this role does not extend to or satisfy Qatar import and market-surveillance requirements.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接的监管等同规定，要求出口制造商为产品合规指定目的国境内的进口商/责任方。中国出口制造商通常以商业形式聘用海外经销商或贸易公司，但不存在与卡塔尔当地进口商要求类似的法定义务。在国内CCC制度下，认证持有人仅为中国市场的责任方；该角色不延伸至卡塔尔进口和市场监管要求，亦不能满足后者。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接的監管等同規定，要求出口製造商為產品合規指定目的國境內的進口商/責任方。中國出口製造商通常以商業形式聘用海外經銷商或貿易公司，但不存在與卡塔爾當地進口商要求類似的法定義務。在國內CCC制度下，認證持有人僅為中國市場的責任方；該角色不延伸至卡塔爾進口和市場監管要求，亦不能滿足後者。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent requiring a foreign in-country importer/responsible party

gap.en: This is a structural gap with no Chinese regulatory analogue. A Chinese refrigerator manufacturer cannot ship directly to the Qatar market without engaging a locally established, registered Qatari importer who: holds the necessary trade licence and import registration; is named on or holds the QGOSM product registration/conformity certificate; arranges customs clearance at Hamad Port; ensures the GSO/Qatar energy label and 240 V / 50 Hz markings are in place; and serves as the market-surveillance contact. Cross-border e-commerce or direct B2B supply without such an importer cannot clear Qatari customs. The manufacturer must therefore secure a compliant importer/distributor relationship as a precondition of market entry — a step that has no parallel in the Chinese domestic CCC framework.
gap.zh: 这是一个在中国监管体系中没有类似规定的结构性差距。中国电冰箱制造商在没有聘用当地设立、注册的卡塔尔进口商的情况下不能直接向卡塔尔市场发货，该进口商须：持有必要的营业执照和进口注册；列名于或持有QGOSM产品注册/合格证书；在哈马德港安排清关；确保GSO/卡塔尔能效标签及240 V / 50 Hz标识到位；并作为市场监管联系点。没有此类进口商的跨境电商或直接B2B供货不能通过卡塔尔海关。因此制造商须将取得合规的进口商/经销商关系作为市场准入前提——这在中国国内CCC框架中无对应步骤。
gap.zht: 這是一個在中國監管體系中沒有類似規定的結構性差距。中國電冰箱製造商在沒有聘用當地設立、註冊的卡塔爾進口商的情況下不能直接向卡塔爾市場發貨，該進口商須：持有必要的營業執照和進口註冊；列名於或持有QGOSM產品註冊/合格證書；在哈馬德港安排清關；確保GSO/卡塔爾能效標籤及240 V / 50 Hz標識到位；並作為市場監管聯繫點。沒有此類進口商的跨境電商或直接B2B供貨不能通過卡塔爾海關。因此製造商須將取得合規的進口商/經銷商關係作為市場准入前提——這在中國國內CCC框架中無對應步驟。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a locally established, registered Qatari importer/responsible party is required to import and place household refrigerators on the Qatar market and to clear goods at Hamad Port; no exemption for direct cross-border supply
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese export manufacturers have no statutory obligation to appoint a foreign in-country importer under Chinese law

source.publisher: Ministry of Commerce and Industry (MOCI), Qatar / Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology (QGOSM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A locally established, registered Qatari importer/responsible party is a mandatory market-access requirement for household refrigerators in Qatar. The importer holds or is named on the QGOSM registration and clears goods at Hamad Port. Chinese manufacturers have no equivalent domestic obligation and must secure a compliant importer/distributor before any shipment; direct cross-border supply without one cannot clear Qatari customs.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 当地设立、注册的卡塔尔进口商/责任方是家用电冰箱进入卡塔尔市场的强制性准入要求。进口商持有或被列名于QGOSM注册，并在哈马德港清关。中国制造商无对应的国内义务，须在任何发货前取得合规的进口商/经销商；没有进口商的直接跨境供货不能通过卡塔尔海关。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 當地設立、註冊的卡塔爾進口商/責任方是家用電冰箱進入卡塔爾市場的強制性准入要求。進口商持有或被列名於QGOSM註冊，並在哈馬德港清關。中國製造商無對應的國內義務，須在任何發貨前取得合規的進口商/經銷商；沒有進口商的直接跨境供貨不能通過卡塔爾海關。
